title: How to utilize a custom Workflow Block in the Automation Center?

posts.author: markbarfs (Mark Buckner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Heyo!

I’ve built a Workflow Block for an “Integration for sentence builder” feature. It’d be really nifty to use it in the Automation Center where you can build a custom recipe for an automation on a board (see the screenshot below), but the Workflow Block doesn’t show up in the list of available actions. Is there a way to do this?

Screenshot 2024-07-16 at 5.11.47 PM1320×1164 72.6 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you check the box to publish the workflow block in the automations center?

image695×268 15.9 KB
